subcodes.first_line: O Fadlu'llah! The Kingdom of grace hath been made manifest, the Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth, and the horizon of the heaven of utterance gloweth with luminous meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا فضل الله ملکوت فضل ظاهر و قلم اعلی ناطق و افق سماء بیان بنیر معانی روشن و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action
